word.tr_en: to come into sight; to become visible; to become apparent
word.tr_de: sichtbar werden; ins Blickfeld rücken; erscheinen

sentence.s: 【空：そら】に【雲：くも】が【現：あらわ】れた。
sentence.rom: Sora ni kumo ga arawareta.
sentence.tr_en: Clouds become visible in the sky.
sentence.tr_de: Wolken wurden am Himmel sichtbar.

sentence.s: オバケが【庭：にわ】に【現：あらわ】れた。
sentence.rom: Obake ga niwa ni arawareta.
sentence.tr_en: A spirit appeared in the garden.
sentence.tr_de: Ein Gespenst erschien im Garten.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT; jisho has nx for obake

word.tr_en: to reveal sth.; to show sth.; to represent sth.
word.tr_de: etw. aufdecken; etw. zeigen; etw. repräsentieren

phrase.ph: 【頭：とう】【角：かく】を【現：あらわ】す
phrase.tr_en: to distinguish oneself; to stand out
phrase.rem: jisho has nx for tōkaku

sentence.s: 【彼：かの】【女：じょ】は【姿：すがた】を【現：あらわ】さなかった。
sentence.rom: Kanojo wa sugata o arawasanakatta.
sentence.tr_en: She did not turn up.
sentence.tr_de: Sie hat sich nicht blicken lassen.

word.tr_en: to entrust (a task) to another; to leave sth. to so.
word.tr_de: (eine Aufgabe) jem. anvertrauen; jem. etw. überlassen

sentence.s: そのことなら【僕：ぼく】に【任：まか】せてください。
sentence.rom: Sono koto nara boku ni makasete kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: If it's about that (ah! that matter), leave it to me.
sentence.tr_de: Wenn's darum geht (ah! diese Sache), überlass es mir.

word.tr_en: to comb; to brush
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.117 vocab section; jisho has nx

sentence.s: 【高：たか】【橋：はし】さんは【髪：かみ】をとかしながら よく【歌：うた】ってるね。
sentence.rom: Takahashi-san wa kami o tokashi nagara yoku utatteru ne.
sentence.tr_en: Miss Takahashi often sings when brushing her hair, doesn't she?
sentence.tr_de: Frau Takahashi singt oft, wenn sie ihr Haar kämmt, was?

word.tr_en: to notice; to become aware of
word.tr_de: etw. bemerken; sich etw. bewusst werden

phrase.tr_en: to to liven up; to become animated
phrase.rem: jisho has nx; ChatGPT says it's quite common

sentence.s: 【空：くう】【港：こう】に【着：つ】いたらパスポートがないとすぐ【気：き】づいた。
sentence.rom: Kūkō ni tsuitara pasupōto ga nai to sugu kidzuita.
sentence.tr_en: When I arrived at the airport, I realized straight away that I didn't have my passport.
sentence.tr_de: Gerade als ich am Flughafen ankam, wurde mir bewusst, dass ich den Pass nicht dabei hatte.

sentence.s: 【商：しょう】【売：ばい】が【活：かっ】【気：き】づきそうです。
sentence.rom: Shōbai ga kakkidzuki-sō desu.
sentence.tr_en: It appears that trade is picking up.
sentence.tr_de: Es scheint, dass der Handel in Schwung kommt.

word.tr_en: to let so. say sth.; to make so. say sth.
word.tr_de: jem. etw. sagen lassen; jem. zwingen, etw. zu sagen

phrase.ph: 【自：じ】【由：ゆう】に【意：い】【見：けん】を【言：い】わせてくれる
phrase.rom: jiyū ni iken o iwasete kureru
phrase.tr_en: to be allowed to express one's opinion freely
phrase.tr_de: mich die eigene Meinung frei sagen lassen
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

sentence.s: 【最：さい】【後：ご】まで【言：い】わせてください。
sentence.rom: Saigo made iwasete kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: Let me finish (speaking).
sentence.tr_de: Lass mich zu Ende reden.

word.tr_en: to come in contact with; to touch

phrase.ph: 【間：ま】【違：ちが】ってボタンに【触：ふ】れる
phrase.tr_en: to touch a button by mistake
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT Also possible: うっかりボタンに触れる; but ukkari is n2 The verb 触る・さわる cannot be used here, because sawaru is usually intentional.

sentence.s: 【何：なに】かが【足：あし】に【触：ふ】れるのを【感：かん】じた。
sentence.rom: Nanika ga ashi ni fureru no o kanjita.
sentence.tr_en: I felt something touch my feet.
sentence.tr_de: Ich fühlte, wie mich etwas am Fuss berührte.

sentence.s: 【机：つくえ】の【上：うえ】にある【手：て】【紙：がみ】が【彼：かれ】の【目：め】に【触：ふ】れた。
sentence.rom: Tsukue no ue ni aru tegami ga kare no me ni fureta.
sentence.tr_en: The letter on the desk caught his eye.
sentence.tr_de: Sein Blick fiel auf den Brief, der auf dem Schreibtisch lag.

word.tr_en: to blame; to urge

sentence.s: 【自：じ】【分：ぶん】を【責：せ】めることはない。
sentence.rom: Jibun o semeru koto wa nai.
sentence.tr_en: There's no need to blame yourself.
sentence.tr_de: Mach dir keine Vorwürfe.

sentence.s: その【問：もん】【題：だい】について【責：せ】められることはない。
sentence.rom: Sono mondai ni tsuite semerareru koto wa nai.
sentence.tr_en: One cannot be blamed for that issue.
sentence.tr_de: Man kann niemanden wegen dieses Problems beschuldigen.

word.tr_en: to sink; to go under; to submerge

sentence.s: 【船：ふね】が【沈：しず】むと、ネズミは【逃：に】げ【出：だ】す。
sentence.rom: Fune ga shizumu to, nezumi wa nigedasu.
sentence.tr_en: When the ship sinks, the rats flee.
sentence.tr_de: Wenn das Schiff sinkt, fliehen die Ratten.

word.tr_en: to be delivered; (a letter) arrives

phrase.ph: 【手：て】の【届：とど】かない【所：ところ】
phrase.tr_en: a place you can't reach with your hands
phrase.tr_de: ein Ort, an dem man mit den Händen nicht rankommt

sentence.s: 【薬：くすり】は【子：こ】【供：ども】の【手：て】の【届：とど】かない【所：ところ】に【置：お】きなさい。
sentence.rom: Kusuri wa kodomo no te no todokanai tokoro ni okinasai.
sentence.tr_en: Put the medicine where children can't get at it.
sentence.tr_de: Versorge die Medikamente an einem Ort, wo die Kinder nicht rankommen.

sentence.s: 【十：とお】【日：か】【以：い】【内：ない】に【届：とど】けるって【書：か】いてあったのに、まだ【届：とど】いてない。
sentence.rom: Tōka inai ni todokeru tte kaite atta no ni, mada todoite nai.
sentence.tr_en: They wrote they would deliver it within ten days, but it hasn't been delivered yet.
sentence.tr_de: Es stand, dass sie innert zehn Tagen liefern würde, aber sie haben es immer noch nicht geliefert.

word.tr_en: to make sth. match to sth.; to join together

phrase.ph: 【調：ちょう】【子：し】を【合：あ】わせる
あれこれ【考：かんが】え【合：あ】わせる
phrase.tr_en: to take this and that together into consideration
phrase.tr_de: dieses und jenes zusammen in Betracht ziehen
phrase.rem: jisho has nx for kangae-awaseru, but n3 for kangae, awaseru

sentence.s: ピアノに【合：あ】わせて【大：おお】きな【声：こえ】で【歌：うた】いましょう。
sentence.rom: Piano ni awasete ōki na koe de utaimashō.
sentence.tr_en: Let's sing along with the piano in a big voice.
sentence.tr_de: Lass uns mit lauter Stimme zum Klavier singen.

word.tr_en: to pour into; to water; to sprinkle on
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.286 kanji section

sentence.s: 【彼：かの】【女：じょ】はカップにミルクを【注：そそ】いだ。
sentence.rom: Kanojo wa kappu ni miruku o sosoida.
sentence.tr_en: She poured milk into the cup.
sentence.tr_de: Sie goss Milch in die Tasse.

word.tr_en: to pour (into a vessel); to fill (a cup); to dish out (food)
word.rem: ChatGPT says 注ぐ is nowadays always そそぐ; つぐ is rare and archaic

word.tr_en: to surround; to encircle

phrase.ph: 【海：うみ】に【囲：かこ】まれた【島：しま】
phrase.tr_en: an island that is surrounded by the sea
phrase.tr_de: eine Insel, die vom Meer umgeben ist
phrase.rem: rephrased by ChatGPT; also possible: 海に囲まれている島

phrase.ph: 【四：し】【方：ほう】から【取：と】り【囲：かこ】む
phrase.tr_en: to gather around from all sides
phrase.rem: ChatGPT says tori-kakomu adds emphasis

sentence.s: 【警：けい】【官：かん】が【建：たて】【物：もの】を【取：と】り【囲：かこ】んだ。
sentence.rom: Keikan ga tatemono o tori-kakonda.
sentence.tr_en: The police officers encircled the building.
sentence.tr_de: Die Polizisten umkreisten das Gebäude.

word.tr_en: to rot; to go bad; to decay

phrase.ph: 【腐：くさ】った【牛：ぎゅう】【乳：にゅう】

sentence.s: その【果：くだ】【物：もの】は【腐：くさ】った。
sentence.rom: Sono kudamono wa kusatta.
sentence.tr_en: That fruit has gone bad.
sentence.tr_de: Diese Frucht ist verfault.

word.tr_en: to be restricted to; to limit; to confine
word.tr_de: auf etw. beschränkt sein; beschränken; eingrenzen

phrase.ph: 【限：かぎ】られた【時：じ】【間：かん】で

sentence.s: 【夏：なつ】はビールに【限：かぎ】るね。
sentence.rom: Natsu wa bīru ni kagiru ne.
sentence.tr_en: Nothing beats beer in summer.
sentence.tr_de: Im Sommer geht nichts über ein Bier.

sentence.s: ベッドに【寝：ね】ても【眠：ねむ】るとは【限：かぎ】らない。
sentence.rom: Beddo ni nete mo nemuru to wa kagiranai.
sentence.tr_en: To lie down on the bed does not necessarily mean you'll actually sleep.
sentence.tr_de: Sich aufs Bett hinlegen bedeutet nicht unbedingt, dass man schläft.

word.tr_en: to drop off (a passenger); to unload (goods)

phrase.rem: lib0 has 荷を降ろす and 荷降ろしされる

phrase.ph: 【車：くるま】から【家：か】【具：ぐ】を【降：お】ろす
phrase.tr_en: to unload the furniture from the car
phrase.tr_de: die Möbel aus dem Wagen ausladen
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

sentence.s: どこで【君：きみ】を【降：お】ろそうか。
sentence.rom: Doko de kimi o orosō ka?
sentence.tr_en: Where shall I drop you off?
sentence.tr_de: Wo soll ich dich absetzen? (Wo willst du aussteigen?)

sentence.s: 【美：び】【術：じゅつ】【館：かん】【前：まえ】で【降：お】ろしてください。
sentence.rom: Bijutsukan mae de oroshite kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: Please let me off in front of the museum.
sentence.tr_de: Bitte lassen Sie mich vor dem Museum aussteigen.

word.tr_en: to smile

phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT; jisho has nx; lib0 has すてきな微笑み (charming smile)

sentence.s: 【中：なか】【村：むら】さんはうれしそうに【微笑：ほほえ】んだ。
sentence.rom: Nakamura-san wa ureshisō ni hohoenda.
sentence.tr_en: Mrs Nakamura smiled happily.
sentence.tr_de: Frau Nakamura lächelte glücklich.

sentence.s: 【中：なか】【村：むら】さんが【私：わたし】に【微笑：ほほえ】んだ。
sentence.rom: Nakamura-san ga watashi ni hohoenda.
sentence.tr_en: Mrs Nakamura smiled at me.
sentence.tr_de: Frau Nakamura lächelte mich an.

word.tr_en: to freeze; to be frozen over; to congeal

sentence.s: 【湖：みずうみ】は【凍：こお】っていたので【氷：こおり】の【上：うえ】を【歩：ある】いて【渡：わた】った。
sentence.rom: Mizūmi wa kōtte ita no de kōri no ue o aruite watatta.
sentence.tr_en: The lake was frozen, so we crossed it walking on the ice.
sentence.tr_de: Da der See gefroren war, liefen wir auf dem Eis und überquerten wir ihn.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT that the tense of kōtte ita is correct

word.tr_en: to put sth. back; to return sth.

phrase.ph: 【本：ほん】を【棚：たな】に【戻：もど】す
phrase.tr_en: to put the book back onto the shelf
phrase.tr_de: das Buch zurück ins Regal stellen

phrase.tr_en: to restore sth.; to undo sth.; to revert sth.
phrase.tr_de: etw. wiederherstellen; etw. zurücksetzen; etw. rückgängig machen

phrase.tr_en: to call so. back; to recall; to revive
phrase.rem: jisho has nx, but n5 for yobu

phrase.tr_en: to take back; to regain; to recover
phrase.rem: jisho has n1

sentence.s: どうやってそれを【元：もと】に【戻：もど】せばいいかな。
sentence.rom: Dō yatte sore o moto ni modoseba ii ka na.
sentence.tr_en: How can I restore it?
sentence.tr_de: Wie kann ich es wiederherstellen?

word.tr_en: to stick through; to carry sth. through; to let sb. pass
word.tr_de: etw. durchstechen; etw. durchbringen; jem. durchlassen

phrase.ph: 【一：ひと】【晩：ばん】【中：じゅう】【泣：な】き【通：とお】す
phrase.tr_de: durch die ganze Nacht hindurch weinen
phrase.rem: jisho has nx for hito-ban-jū; there is also 夜通し・よどおし (nx)

sentence.s: この【上：うわ】【着：ぎ】は【雨：あめ】を【通：とお】さない。
sentence.rom: Kono uwagi wa ame o tōsanai.
sentence.tr_en: This coat is rainproof.
sentence.tr_de: Dieser Mantel ist regenfest.

sentence.s: 【電：でん】【線：せん】は【電：でん】【気：き】を【通：とお】す。
sentence.rom: Densen wa denki o tōsu.
sentence.tr_en: A wire conducts electricity.
sentence.tr_de: Ein Kabel leitet Elektrizität.
sentence.rem: jisho has n1 for densen; lib0 has 電線は電気を流す; but ChatGPT says it's not natural

word.tr_en: to get together and talk

phrase.ph: 【計：けい】【画：かく】を【話：はな】し【合：あ】う
phrase.tr_en: to get together and discuss the plans (schedule)
phrase.tr_de: sich treffen und den Zeitplan diskutieren

sentence.s: そのことについて【彼：かれ】と【話：はな】し【合：あ】う【必：ひつ】【要：よう】がある。
sentence.rom: Sono koto ni tsuite kare to hanashi-au hitsuyō ga aru.
sentence.tr_en: It's necessary that I meet and discuss the matter with him.
sentence.tr_de: Es ist notwendig, dass ich ihn treffe und die Sache mit ihm bespreche.

word.tr_en: to give sb. a ride; to take sth. on board
word.tr_de: jemanden (im Auto, etc.) mitnehmen; etw. mit an Bord nehmen

phrase.ph: 【車：くるま】に【乗：の】せてあげる
phrase.tr_en: to give sb. a lift (by car)

phrase.ph: 【駅：えき】まで【乗：の】せてもらう
phrase.tr_en: to get a lift to the station
phrase.tr_de: eine Mitfahrgelegenheit bis zum Bahnhof bekommen

sentence.s: 【車：くるま】に【乗：の】せてくれないか。
sentence.rom: Kuruma ni nosete kurenai ka?
sentence.tr_en: Can you give me a lift? (by car)
sentence.tr_de: Könntest du mich im Auto mitnehmen?

sentence.s: 【車：くるま】に【乗：の】せてあげましょうか。
sentence.rom: Kuruma ni nosete agemashō ka?
sentence.tr_en: Can I give you a ride? (by car)
sentence.tr_de: Kann ich Sie im Auto mitnehmen?

word.tr_en: to be sold; to sell well
word.tr_de: verkauft werden; es verkauft sich gut

phrase.tr_en: to be able to sell it at a good price

sentence.s: 【傘：かさ】が【良：よ】く【売：う】れる。
sentence.rom: Kasa ga yoku ureru.
sentence.tr_en: Umbrellas sell well.
sentence.tr_de: Regenschirme verkaufen sich gut

sentence.s: この【家：いえ】は【今：いま】のままでは【売：う】れないだろう。
sentence.rom: Kono ie wa ima no mama de wa urenai darō.
sentence.tr_en: This house in its current condition will not sell.
sentence.tr_de: Dieses Haus wird in sich im momentanen Zustand nicht gut verkaufen lassen.

word.tr_en: to advance; to put (a clock) forward; to proceed with
word.tr_de: etw. fortführen; (Uhr) vorstellen; etw. vorwärts bringen

phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT that it doesn't necessarily mean to make good progress

sentence.s: 【時：と】【計：けい】の【針：はり】を【進：すす】めた。
sentence.rom: Tokei no hari o susumeta.
sentence.tr_en: I advanced the hands of the clock.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe die Uhrzeiger vorgestellt.

word.tr_en: to knit
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.25 vocab section; jisho has n2

sentence.s: 【彼：かの】【女：じょ】は【祖：そ】【母：ぼ】からハンドバッグを【編：あ】む【技：ぎ】【術：じゅつ】を【学：まな】んだ。
sentence.rom: Kanojo wa sobo kara handobaggu o amu gijutsu o mananda.
sentence.tr_en: She learned the craft of knitting a handbag from her grandmother.
sentence.tr_de: Sie hat die Technik, eine Handtasche zu stricken, von ihrer Grossmutter gelernt.
sentence.rem: changed バスケット to ハンドバッグ, because baskets are actually woven (織る)

word.tr_en: to be mistaken; to be wrong

phrase.ph: 【間：ま】【違：ちが】ったバスに【乗：の】る

sentence.s: 【誰：だれ】でも【間：ま】【違：ちが】う【事：こと】はある。
sentence.rom: Dare demo machigau koto wa aru.
sentence.tr_en: Anyone makes mistakes.
sentence.tr_de: Jedermann macht Fehler.

word.tr_en: to repeat

phrase.ph: 【同：おな】じ【間：ま】【違：ちが】いを【繰：く】り【返：かえ】す
phrase.tr_en: to make the same mistake again

sentence.s: 【質：しつ】【問：もん】を【繰：く】り【返：かえ】しました。
sentence.rom: Shitsumon o kurikaeshimashita.
sentence.tr_en: I repeated the question.
sentence.tr_de: Ich wiederholte die Frage.

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【同：おな】じ【冗：じょう】【談：だん】を【繰：く】り【返：かえ】してばかりいる。
sentence.rom: Kare wa onaji jōdan o kurikaeshite bakari iru.
sentence.tr_en: He keeps telling the same joke over and over again.
sentence.tr_de: Er erzählt ständig den gleichen Witz immer wieder.

word.tr_en: to change clothes
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 L21 vocab section; jisho has nx

phrase.ph: 【着：き】【替：が】えるために【家：いえ】へ【帰：かえ】る
phrase.rom: kigaeru tame ni ie e kaeru
phrase.tr_en: to go home in order to change clothes
phrase.tr_de: nach Hause gehen, um die Kleider zu wechseln

phrase.ph: パジャマに【着：き】【替：が】える

sentence.s: 【着：き】【替：が】えてきます。
sentence.rom: Kigaete kimasu.
sentence.tr_en: I'm going to change and I'll be back.
sentence.tr_de: Ich werde mich umziehen und komme gleich wieder zurück.

word.tr_en: to kill; to murder; to destroy

sentence.s: この【虫：むし】を【殺：ころ】さないで。
sentence.rom: Kono mushi o korosanaide.
sentence.tr_en: Don't kill this insect.
sentence.tr_de: Töte dieses Insekt nicht.

word.tr_en: to be silent; to say nothing

phrase.tr_en: to fall silent; to say no more

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】たちはみんな【黙：だま】っていた。
sentence.rom: Watashi-tachi wa minna damatte ita.
sentence.tr_en: All of us were silent.
sentence.tr_de: Wir waren alle still.

sentence.s: 【黙：だま】って【聞：き】きなさい。
sentence.rom: Damatte kikinasai.
sentence.tr_en: Shut up and listen.
sentence.tr_de: Halt den Mund und höre zu.

word.tr_en: to be worried; to be troubled

phrase.rem: jisho has nx, but n4 for omou, n3 for nayamu

sentence.s: その【知：し】らせにひどく【悩：なや】んだ。
sentence.rom: Sono shirase ni hidoku nayanda.
sentence.tr_en: I was very troubled by those news.
sentence.tr_de: Ich war sehr besorgt aufgrund dieser Nachricht.

word.tr_en: to move sth.; to shift; to set sth. in motion
word.tr_de: etw. bewegen; etw. verschieben; etw. in Bewegung setzen

sentence.s: 【手：て】を【動：うご】かさないで。
sentence.rom: Te o ugokasanaide.
sentence.tr_en: Keep your hand still.
sentence.tr_de: Bewege deine Hand nicht.

word.tr_en: to be separated; to drift away

phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】と【彼：かの】【女：じょ】は【離：はな】れてしまった。
sentence.rom: Kare to kanojo wa hanarete shimatta.
sentence.tr_en: He and she ended up growing apart.
sentence.tr_de: Er und sie haben sich leider getrennt.

sentence.s: 【駅：えき】は【少：すこ】し【離：はな】れている。
sentence.rom: Eki wa sukoshi hanarete iru.
sentence.tr_en: The station is a little way off.
sentence.tr_de: Der Bahnhof ist ein Stück weit entfernt.

sentence.s: なぜ【頭：あたま】から【離：はな】れない？
sentence.rom: Naze atama kara hanarenai?
sentence.tr_en: Why can't I get it out of my head?
sentence.tr_de: Warum kann ich es nicht aus meinem Kopf bekommen?

word.tr_en: to turn toward; to look (up, down, etc.); to face (e.g. east)
word.tr_de: sich in eine Richtung wenden; in eine bestimmte Richtung schauen

phrase.tr_en: to be facing in the opposite direction

sentence.s: 【左：ひだり】を【向：む】いてください。
sentence.rom: Hidari o muite kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: Please face your left (turn your body to your left).
sentence.tr_de: Bitte wende dich nach links.
sentence.rem: ChatGPT says へ is also possible, but を is more common

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】の【方：ほう】を【向：む】いてください。
sentence.rom: Watashi no hō o muite kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: Please look in my direction (turn yourself towards me).
sentence.tr_de: Bitte schau in meine Richtung.

word.tr_en: to turn sth.; to aim at sth.; to pursue sth.
word.tr_de: etw. drehen; auf etw. abzielen; etw. verfolgen

phrase.tr_en: to turn one's back on someone
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

sentence.s: 【公：こう】【園：えん】の【方：ほう】に【足：あし】を【向：む】けた。
sentence.rom: Kōen no hō ni ashi o muketa.
sentence.tr_en: I turned my steps towards the park.
sentence.tr_de: Ich steuerte meine Schritte in Richtung Park.

word.tr_en: to approach; to draw near; to get closer to
word.rem: appears in Doraemon 7, p.76; jisho has n1, but n5 for 近い, n4 for 付く

phrase.ph: 【近：ちか】づいてくる【台：たい】【風：ふう】

sentence.s: あの【犬：いぬ】には【近：ちか】づくな。
sentence.rom: Ano inu ni wa chikadzuku na.
sentence.tr_en: Keep away from that dog.
sentence.tr_de: Halte dich von diesem Hund fern.

sentence.s: もうちょっと【近：ちか】づくと【聞：き】こえるはずだ。
sentence.rom: Mō chotto chikadzuku to kikoeru hazu da.
sentence.tr_en: Get a little closer, and you should be able to hear.
sentence.tr_de: Gehe etwas näher ran, und du solltest es hören können.

word.tr_en: to divide sth.; to split sth.; to separate sth.

phrase.tr_en: to tell apart; to distinguish visually
phrase.rem: jisho has nx

phrase.ph: 【夢：ゆめ】と【現：げん】【実：じつ】を【分：わ】ける
phrase.tr_en: to distinguish between dream and reality

phrase.ph: お【金：かね】を【平：びょう】【等：どう】に【分：わ】ける
phrase.tr_en: to divide the money into equal parts
phrase.tr_de: das Geld in gleiche Teile aufteilen

phrase.ph: 【砂：すな】から【金：きん】をより【分：わ】ける
phrase.tr_en: to separate the gold from the sand

sentence.s: 【君：きみ】と【君：きみ】の【弟：おとうと】を【見：み】【分：わ】けるのは【難：むずか】しい。
sentence.rom: Kimi to kimi no otōto o mi-wakeru no wa muzukashii.
sentence.tr_en: It is hard to tell you from your brother apart.
sentence.tr_de: Es ist schwierig, dich und deinen Bruder auseinanderzuhalten.

word.tr_en: to dawn; to grow light

phrase.rem: jisho also has 朝が明ける, but ChatGPT says only 夜が明ける is idiomatic

sentence.s: もうすぐ【夜：よる】が【明：あ】ける。
sentence.rom: Mō sugu yoru ga akeru.
sentence.tr_en: The day is breaking soon.
sentence.tr_de: Der Tag bricht bald an.

word.tr_en: to turn sth.; to rotate sth.

keep_apart_from.rem: mawasu can have the meaning of 'pass around'

phrase.rem: jisho has nx

sentence.s: メモを【読：よ】んで【回：まわ】してください。
sentence.rom: Memo o yonde mawashite kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: Please read the note and pass it around.
sentence.tr_de: Bitte lies die Notiz und gib sie weiter.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT that it cannot mean turning the page upside-down or flipping it

sentence.s: 【塩：しお】を【回：まわ】してくれませんか。
sentence.rom: Shio o mawashite kuremasen ka?
sentence.tr_en: Could you pass me the salt, please?
sentence.tr_de: Können Sie mir bitte das Salz reichen?

word.tr_en: to shiver; to tremble

phrase.ph: 【緊：きん】【張：ちょう】で【震：ふる】えている
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT

phrase.ph: 【恐：きょう】【怖：ふ】で【震：ふる】えている

sentence.s: 【寒：さむ】くて みんな【震：ふる】えていた。
sentence.rom: Samukute minna furuete ita.
sentence.tr_en: It was cold, and everyone shivered.
sentence.tr_de: Es war kalt, und alle zitterten.

word.tr_en: to go past; to pass; to pass by

phrase.ph: 【喫：きっ】【茶：さ】【店：てん】を【通：とお】り【過：す】ぎる

sentence.s: 【多：おお】くの【車：くるま】が【通：とお】り【過：す】ぎた。
sentence.rom: Ōku no kuruma ga tōri-sugita.
sentence.tr_en: Many cars passed by.
sentence.tr_de: Viele Autos fuhren vorbei.

sentence.s: 【彼：かの】【女：じょ】は【僕：ぼく】に【気：き】がつかずに【通：とお】り【過：す】ぎた。
sentence.rom: Kanojo wa boku ni ki ga tsukazu ni tōri-sugita.
sentence.tr_en: She passed by without seeing me.
sentence.tr_de: Sie ging an mir vorbei, ohne mich zu sehen.

word.tr_en: to desire; to request; to implore

phrase.ph: 【世：せ】【界：かい】【平：へい】【和：わ】を【願：ねが】っている

sentence.s: 【誰：だれ】でも【幸：こう】【福：ふく】を【願：ねが】っている。
sentence.rom: Dare demo kōfuku o negatte iru.
sentence.tr_en: Everybody hopes for happiness.
sentence.tr_de: Jedermann wünscht sich Glück.
sentence.rem: ChatGPT says, this is also possible: 誰でも幸福を求めている but that would sound more like striving, everyone pursues happiness

word.tr_en: to be sad; to mourn for; to regret
word.tr_de: traurig sein; etw. beklagen; etw. bedauern

sentence.s: 【悲：かな】しまないでください。
sentence.rom: Kanashimanaide kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: Please don't be sad.
sentence.tr_de: Bitte sei nicht traurig.

word.tr_en: to widen sth.; to spread sth.; to expand sth.
word.tr_de: etw. verbreitern; etw. ausbreiten; etw. erweitern
word.rem: jisho has n2, but n3 for hirogaru

phrase.ph: 【机：つくえ】の【上：うえ】に【地：ち】【図：ず】を【広：ひろ】げる
phrase.rom: tsukue no ue ni chizu o hirogeru
phrase.tr_en: to spread the map out on the table
phrase.tr_de: die Karte auf dem Tisch ausbreiten

sentence.s: その【鳥：とり】は【羽：はね】を【広：ひろ】げた。
sentence.rom: Sono tori wa hane o hirogeta.
sentence.tr_en: The bird spread out its wings.
sentence.tr_de: Der Vogel spreizte seine Flügel.
sentence.rem: replaced 翼・つばさ by 羽・はね, which acc. to ChatGPT is the same but more common in everyday speech

word.tr_en: to be spread out; it extends to; to fill (a space)

phrase.ph: 【全：ぜん】【国：こく】に【広：ひろ】がる
phrase.tr_en: it spreads over the entire country

sentence.s: その【噂：うわさ】は【町：まち】【中：じゅう】に【広：ひろ】がった。
sentence.rom: Sono uwasa wa machijū ni hirogatta.
sentence.tr_en: That gossip spread all over town.
sentence.tr_de: Das Gerücht verbreitete sich in der ganzen Stadt.
sentence.rem: jisho has まちなか and まちじゅう for 町中; machi-naka is downtown, machijū is all over town

word.tr_en: to hate; to dislike; to loathe

sentence.s: 【父：ちち】は【変：へん】【化：か】を【嫌：きら】う【性：せい】【格：かく】だ。
sentence.rom: Chichi wa henka o kirau seikaku da.
sentence.tr_en: My father has personality that dislikes change.
sentence.tr_de: Mein Vater hat eine Persönlichkeit, die Veränderungen hasst.

sentence.s: 【彼：かの】【女：じょ】は【注：ちゅう】【目：もく】されるのを【嫌：きら】う。
sentence.rom: Kanojo wa chūmoku sareru no o kirau.
sentence.tr_en: She hates being the centre of attention.
sentence.tr_de: Sie hasst es, im Zentrum der Aufmerksamkeit zu sein.

word.tr_en: to be hit; to be successful

phrase.tr_en: to suddenly understand; to recall in a flash
phrase.tr_de: etw. plötzlich verstehen; sich plötzlich erinnern
phrase.rem: jisho has nx, but n4 for omou, n3 for ataru

sentence.s: ボールが【木：き】【村：むら】さんの【目：め】に【当：あ】たった。
sentence.rom: Bōru ga Kimura-san no me ni atatta.
sentence.tr_en: The ball hit Miss Kimura in the eye.
sentence.tr_de: Der Ball traf Frau Kimura ins Auge.
sentence.rem: The sentence may be confusing, because it's v.t. in English

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】の【靴：くつ】が【見：み】【当：あ】たらない。
sentence.rom: Watashi no kutsu ga mi-ataranai.
sentence.tr_en: I can't find my shoes.
sentence.tr_de: Ich kann meine Schuhe nicht finden.

word.tr_en: to hit sth; to expose sth. to sunlight
word.tr_de: etw. treffen; etw. dem Sonnenlicht aussetzen

sentence.s: 【濡：ぬ】れた【服：ふく】を【日：にっ】【光：こう】に【当：あ】てておこう。
sentence.rom: Nureta fuku o nikkō ni atete okō.
sentence.tr_en: Let's put the wet clothes into the sunlight.
sentence.tr_de: Legen wir die nassen Kleider ins Sonnenlicht!

word.tr_en: to keep sb. waiting
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 L20 vocab section; jisho has nx, but n2 for o-matase shimashita

phrase.ph: 【長：なが】い【間：あいだ】【待：ま】たせる
phrase.tr_en: to keep sb. waiting for a long time
phrase.tr_de: jem. eine lange Zeit warten lassen

sentence.s: お【待：ま】たせしました。
sentence.rom: O-matase shimashita.
sentence.tr_en: Sorry to have kept you waiting.
sentence.tr_de: Tut mir leid, dass ich Sie habe warten lassen.

word.tr_en: thank you for waiting; sorry to have kept you waiting
to separate; to keep apart from

phrase.ph: 【木：き】から【枝：えだ】を【切：き】り【離：はな】す
phrase.tr_en: to cut off a branch from a tree
phrase.tr_de: von einem Baum einen Zweig abschneiden
phrase.rem: jisho has nx for kiri-hanasu, but n5 for kiru, n3 for hanasu

sentence.s: ロープを【離：はな】しなさい。
sentence.rom: Rōpu o hanashi-nasai.
sentence.tr_en: Let go of the rope.
sentence.tr_de: Lass das Seil los.
